The Catalog listed by Name

Below follows the Overview Catalog. To view a galaxy click on its name. This will bring you to the description of the galaxy. Also on that page is a link to a graphical overview of the HI data of the galaxy. The data contained on the graphical overview is described in the Description of data contained on a page. We refer to this page for an explanation of the graphical and textual content of the overview page. The Overview Catalog is under permanent construction, so check this page regularly for your favorite galaxy!

All data have been reduced (i.e. uv-edited, calibrated, fourier transformed, cleaned and preliminary analyzed) by Dolf Sijbring and Jurjen Kamphuis and any errors are their responsibility.

For questions about data requests click here.
